run_repo_to_parquet: run the python module to convert a git repository to parquet format with custom repo path
run_convert_repo_to_parquet: run the convert_repo_to_parquet function to extract git commits and save to parquet file
run_get_arg_vals: run the get_arg_vals function to parse command line arguments for repo path and output file
review_convert_repo_to_parquet: review the convert_repo_to_parquet function that extracts git commits and saves to parquet
refactor_main: refactor the main function to handle git repository to parquet conversion with argparse
